approval_items.description: Exact approval review requires Stage194 credit/billing/Runtime allowance verification first.
The human approver must have the replacement exposure available before any approval phrase can be accepted.
The approval phrase is only evaluated after credit allowance is verified; it must match the replacement phrase exactly.

evidence.approval_phrase_required: APPROVE IBM RUNTIME STAGE188 REPLACEMENT LIVE RUN

approval_items.description: This gate never submits hardware; at most it allows a later live-runner preparation review.

approval_phrase_required: APPROVE IBM RUNTIME STAGE188 REPLACEMENT LIVE RUN

excluded: provider credentials, token values, CRN values, or account secrets
provider-side IBM credit balance or dollar-cost verification
creation of a runnable live-submit command
a noisy-hardware robustness or auditability conclusion
supported: exact replacement approval is isolated from credit allowance verification
approval phrase matching is only accepted after Stage194 records human credit allowance verification
a successful approval review permits only later live-runner preparation review

next_gate: Resolve Stage194 credit allowance first. If the user then provides the exact replacement approval phrase, rerun Stage195 with that phrase and proceed only to live-runner preparation review, not direct submission.
objective: Determine whether PhaseWrap-RoPE's compact phase-wrap positional score has measurable robustness or auditability advantages on noisy quantum hardware, compared with matched positional-score encodings, under fixed circuit width.
